name: Bega Cheese Limited
analysis: BGA's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.7300, stop A$5.3856, target A$6.3700 (1.86:1) — then trail it.
